summary: Iteration 59: Smart Template + Web Search AI Document Suggestions - All features verified. Backend: 18/18 tests passed. Frontend: All UI features verified via Playwright.
critical_code_review_comments: Template matching uses simple keyword scoring - may match wrong template if product name contains multiple country keywords (e.g., 'New Zealand Work Visa' matched UK template due to 'work visa' keyword)
Step name matching is fuzzy - 'Express Entry Profile' matched 'Profile Creation' step instead of actual 'Express Entry Profile' step
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 59 verified Smart Template AI Document Suggestions. Key findings: (1) GET /api/step-documents/templates returns 4 templates (Canada PR, Australia PR, UK Skilled Worker, Student Visa) with correct structure (label, steps, total_documents, fees_info, government_url, assessment_bodies), (2) POST /api/step-documents/ai-suggest-step-docs returns source='template' for matching products with real immigration docs, fees, and government URLs, (3) POST /api/step-documents/ai-suggest-bulk returns template docs for all steps at once, (4) Non-template products fall back to AI (source='ai'), (5) Template suggestions filter out existing_docs, (6) Audit logs created with different actions for template vs AI suggestions, (7) Admin workflow editor has 'AI Auto-Fill Docs' button, (8) CM case detail has 'AI Suggest' button per step, (9) Client 'Documents & Steps' tab shows UnifiedDocumentView with progress card, stats, and step cards.

get_templates_api.details: GET /api/step-documents/templates returns 4 templates with correct structure. Admin and CM can access, client gets 403.

australia_pr_template.details: Australia PR Skills Assessment returns template-sourced docs with source='template', AUD fees ($4,640), homeaffairs.gov.au URL, and real docs like Skills Assessment Outcome Letter, Qualification Certificates.

canada_pr_template.details: Canada PR ECA returns template-sourced docs with source='template', CAD fees ($1,365), canada.ca URL, and real docs like ECA Report, Degree Certificate, Academic Transcripts.

uk_skilled_worker_template.details: UK Skilled Worker CoS returns template-sourced docs with source='template', GBP fees (£719), gov.uk URL, and real docs like Certificate of Sponsorship.

student_visa_template.details: Student Visa Admission returns template-sourced docs with Offer Letter, Transcripts, Statement of Purpose.

ai_fallback.details: Non-template products (e.g., 'XYZ Immigration Service') fall back to AI with source='ai'.

fees_verification.details: Canada: CAD $1,365, Australia: AUD $4,640, UK: GBP £719 - all verified in template fees_info.

government_urls.details: Canada: canada.ca, Australia: homeaffairs.gov.au, UK: gov.uk - all verified.

existing_docs_filter.details: Template suggestions correctly filter out documents already in existing_docs array.

audit_logs.details: Template suggestions create audit log with action 'ai_doc_suggestion_template', AI suggestions create 'ai_doc_suggestion_ai'.

admin_ai_auto_fill_button.details: Admin Products -> Edit Workflow shows 'AI Auto-Fill Docs' button with sparkles icon.

cm_ai_suggest_button.details: CM case detail shows 'AI Suggest' button per unlocked step with sparkles icon.

client_documents_steps.details: Client sidebar shows 'Documents & Steps' tab. UnifiedDocumentView shows Document Progress (20%), stats (Required/Uploaded/Pending/Requested), expandable step cards with upload buttons.

admin_workflow_editor.ai_auto_fill_button: Visible with Sparkles icon, text 'AI Auto-Fill Docs'
admin_workflow_editor.workflow_steps: 4 steps for Canada PR: Integration Test Step, ECA, IELTS/CELPIP/PTE CORE, COPR

cm_case_detail.ai_suggest_button: 1 AI Suggest button visible in unlocked step with Sparkles icon
cm_case_detail.add_doc_button: 1 +Add Doc button visible in unlocked step

client_documents_steps.progress_card: Shows 20% completion (2/10 docs) with gradient color
client_documents_steps.step_cards: 8 expandable step cards with status badges (Complete/In Progress/Pending) and document counts
client_documents_steps.upload_buttons: Visible for mandatory documents in current step
client_documents_steps.additional_requested: Shows 1 additional document requested by Case Manager

mocked_apis.resend_email: MOCK mode - logs to console instead of sending actual emails
